recommendations.title: Texas Killing Fields
recommendations.overview: In the Texas bayous, a local homicide detective teams up with a cop from New York City to investigate a series of unsolved murders.

recommendations.title: Ratsasan
recommendations.overview: A serial killer is murdering school girls, and a newbie cop has to track him down before the victim count increases.

recommendations.title: Wind River
recommendations.overview: An FBI agent teams with the town's veteran game tracker to investigate a murder that occurred on a Native American reservation.

recommendations.title: Howling
recommendations.overview: A beat cop and his rookie partner investigate a series of killings that seem to be carried out by a mysterious wolfdog.

recommendations.title: Talvar
recommendations.overview: A hardened cop deals with three conflicting perspectives involving a brutal double murder. The case is complicated as the prime suspects are the parents who supposedly killed their teenage daughter.

recommendations.title: Drishyam
recommendations.overview: A simple street-smart man tries to protect his family from a cop looking for her missing son who was accidently killed by his daughter.

recommendations.title: Limbo
recommendations.overview: Veteran detective Cham works with rookie cop Will to hunt down the city's serial killer. The investigation leads them to a lair littered with dismembered female limbs, and an ex-con who killed Cham's wife and child years ago...

recommendations.title: The Girl by the Lake
recommendations.overview: A cop investigates the murder of a beautiful teen girl left naked by a lake.

recommendations.title: Black and Blue
recommendations.overview: Rookie cop Alicia West, an Army veteran, inadvertently captures the murder of a young drug dealer on her body cam. After realizing that the murder was committed by corrupt cops, she teams up with the one person from her community who is willing to he

recommendations.title: Murder Mystery
recommendations.overview: On a long-awaited trip to Europe, a New York City cop and his hairdresser wife scramble to solve a baffling murder aboard a billionaire's yacht.
